# Nguyen Cong Hung - Freelance Full-stack Web & Mobile App Developer

> Freelance software engineer available worldwide (remote), working in English. Builds web and mobile apps: order/invoice/debt systems, admin dashboards, and AI automation. Money-accurate, audited, deployed.

## Summary
- Name: Nguyen Cong Hung (Hann)
- Role: Freelance Full-stack Software Engineer (web + mobile apps)
- Location: Vietnam; works remotely with clients worldwide, including Europe and Germany
- Languages: English, Vietnamese
- Contact: business.nc.hung@gmail.com, +84 981 815 237
- GitHub: https://github.com/nc-hung

## Services
- Web and mobile app development (React, React Native, Next.js, Zalo Mini App)
- Invoicing, billing and financial-ledger systems (FIFO reconciliation, supplier statements)
- AI automation and internal tools (chatbots, POS/ERP integrations, reporting, payment reminders)
- Admin dashboards and internal tools
- Rescue and stabilize existing systems

## Tech stack
TypeScript, Node.js, NestJS, Express, React, React Native, Next.js, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Redis, Docker; AI integration (Claude, Gemini, GPT).

## Selected work
- Order & debt platform for a wholesale distributor (FIFO reconciliation, supplier statements, print/QR invoices).
- Zalo Mini App commerce platform with a NestJS BFF (Clean Architecture) and resilient Pancake POS sync.
- Warehouse & sales operations bot (Pancake POS + Zalo OA + AI analysis + payment reminders).
- Hann Nong San high-performance Next.js e-commerce storefront.

## Experience
- Senior Mobile Developer, N.A.M Tech (2024-present).
- Technical Lead, ERP/WMS/CRM, Thiso Retail / Emart (2022-2024).

## Availability
Available for freelance web and app development worldwide, including Europe and Germany. Remote, English-speaking. Replies within 24 hours.
